exam_note: Refreshed objectives go live 2026-07-01; this map tracks the published SY0-701 objectives and their official domain weights.

domains.name: General Security Concepts
objectives: CIA triad, non-repudiation, AAA, zero trust
Change management & cryptographic solutions (PKI, hashing, signing)
domains.ml_security_link: ATT&CK/ATLAS vocabulary + crypto used for model signing (track 05 Sigstore).

domains.name: Threats, Vulnerabilities & Mitigations
domains.ml_security_link: STRIDE threat model of an ML service; OWASP Top 10 break/fix; detection track is mitigation-as-code.

domains.name: Security Architecture
domains.ml_security_link: Secure ML pipeline architecture; network labs (TLS/DNS); data protection for training sets.

domains.name: Security Operations
objectives: Apply security techniques to compute resources
Monitoring, alerting, incident response, digital forensics
domains.ml_security_link: Detection engineering on security telemetry; LLM red-team CI gate as SecOps automation.

domains.name: Security Program Management & Oversight
domains.ml_security_link: Authorized-use/governance posture (ETHICS.md); threat-informed prioritization via ATT&CK/ATLAS.
